## [Note]

dbbot v0.15.0 removes the legacy Keepalived primary-replica MySQL deployment path so new deployments are guided toward clearer HA options.

## [Change]

- Keep `master_slave.yml` as the base primary-replica deployment path for lightweight MySQL topologies and MHA-Go prerequisites.
- Keep Router HA, MHA-Go VIP writer endpoint, and GreatSQL HA VIP handling unchanged.
- Update MySQL documentation to remove the deprecated Keepalived primary-replica entry from the overview and acceptance-check coverage notes.

## [Remove]

- Remove the `keepalived_master_slave.yml` public playbook entry.
- Remove the legacy `make_keepalived` role, its hook scripts, HA account variables, validation tasks, and post-deploy VIP check profile.
